metadata.description: Project name used in resource naming
Deploy the spoke Foundry with Agent Service support
Container Apps DNS zone ID (from hub)
Enable the Agent ID auth sidecar
Log Analytics customer ID (from hub observability)
Log Analytics shared key (from hub observability)
APIM Gateway URL for the sample container app
APIM subscription key for calling the model gateway
Chat agent container image (set after building and pushing to ACR)
Subnet ID for private endpoints (spoke PE subnet)
Private DNS zone ID for Container Apps Environment
AI Foundry project endpoint for Agent SDK (optional)
APIM gateway connection name for Agent SDK model routing
Enable the Agent ID auth sidecar container
Agent Identity app (client) ID — the runtime identity created from the blueprint
Name for the blob container in the spoke storage account

template.containers: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'chat-agent', 'image', parameters('chatAgentImage'), 'resources', createObject('cpu', json('0.5'), 'memory', '1Gi'), 'env', concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'APIM_GATEWAY_URL', 'value', parameters('apimGatewayUrl')), createObject('name', 'OPENAI_API_BASE', 'value', format('{0}/openai', parameters('apimGatewayUrl'))), createObject('name', 'OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT_NAME', 'value', 'gpt-4.1'), createObject('name', 'GATEWAY_CONNECTION_NAME', 'value', parameters('gatewayConnectionName'))), if(not(empty(parameters('apimSubscriptionKey'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'APIM_API_KEY', 'secretRef', 'apim-api-key')), createArray()), if(not(empty(parameters('aiProjectEndpoint'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'AI_PROJECT_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('aiProjectEndpoint'))), createArray()), if(parameters('enableAuthSidecar'), createArray(createObject('name', 'AGENTID_SIDECAR_URL', 'value', 'http://localhost:8080'), createObject('name', 'AGENT_IDENTITY_APP_ID', 'value', parameters('agentIdentityAppId')), createObject('name', 'BLUEPRINT_APP_ID', 'value', parameters('blueprintAppId')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_TENANT_ID', 'value', parameters('entraIdTenantId')), createObject('name', 'STORAGE_ACCOUNT_URL', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('spokeStorageName')), '2023-05-01').primaryEndpoints.blob), createObject('name', 'STORAGE_CONTAINER_NAME', 'value', parameters('storageContainerName'))), createArray()), if(and(parameters('enableAuthSidecar'), parameters('enableA365Observability')), createArray(createObject('name', 'ENABLE_A365_OBSERVABILITY_EXPORTER', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'ENABLE_A365_OBSERVABILITY', 'value', 'true')), createArray())))), if(parameters('enableAuthSidecar'), createArray(createObject('name', 'auth-sidecar', 'image', 'mcr.microsoft.com/entra-sdk/auth-sidecar:1.0.0-azurelinux3.0-distroless', 'resources', createObject('cpu', json('0.25'), 'memory', '0.5Gi'), 'env', createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureAd__Instance', 'value', format('{0}/', environment().authentication.loginEndpoint)), createObject('name', 'AzureAd__TenantId', 'value', parameters('entraIdTenantId')), createObject('name', 'AzureAd__ClientId', 'value', parameters('blueprintAppId')), createObject('name', 'AzureAd__ClientCredentials__0__SourceType', 'value', 'SignedAssertionFromManagedIdentity'), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__CognitiveServices__BaseUrl', 'value', parameters('apimGatewayUrl')), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__CognitiveServices__Scopes__0', 'value', 'https://cognitiveservices.azure.com/.default'), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__CognitiveServices__RequestAppToken', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__CognitiveServices__AcquireTokenOptions__FmiPath', 'value', parameters('agentIdentityAppId')), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__Storage__BaseUrl', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('spokeStorageName')), '2023-05-01').primaryEndpoints.blob), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__Storage__Scopes__0', 'value', 'https://storage.azure.com/.default'), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__Storage__RequestAppToken', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__Storage__AcquireTokenOptions__FmiPath', 'value', parameters('agentIdentityAppId')), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__AgentToken__BaseUrl', 'value', environment().authentication.loginEndpoint), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__AgentToken__Scopes__0', 'value', 'api://AzureADTokenExchange/.default'), createObject('name', 'DownstreamApis__AgentToken__RequestAppToken', 'value', 'true')))), createArray()))]

metadata.description: Name of the NIC to look up
Instance suffix to differentiate hub/spoke deployments
Model deployments to create on this Foundry instance
APIM gateway URL for agent gateway connection (leave empty for hub)
APIM subscription key for agent gateway connection
Application Insights connection string for tracing
ACR login server for hosted agent image pull (leave empty to skip)
ACR resource ID for the connection credential (required when acrLoginServer is set)
